summary: Squad is healthy. Previous blockers resolved — PRs #869 and #870 both merged. Go kernel landed (PR #885), v2.6.0 released (PR #887). 10 PRs merged since last cycle. One open PR (#888) is CI green and awaiting review. EM report PR #889 merged this cycle. No P0/P1 issues. Sprint goal complete — updating to maintenance mode.
